tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
edit 101
set name "Block-Ubuntu-HTTPS-C2"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action deny
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "203.0.113.1/32"
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTPS"
set logtraffic all
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 101
        set name "Block-Ubuntu-HTTPS-C2"
        set uuid cef473e0-2b60-51f1-1009-bdd5b8190927
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "C2-203.0.113.1"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end
